inputs.resume_text:
Rahul Patil
rahul.patil123@gmail.com | +91-7654321098
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Recent graduate with a Bachelor's degree in Commerce who has completed a short online course in data analytics.
Familiar with Excel and basic Python. Enthusiastic about entering the data science field and willing to learn new
technologies.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming: Python (very basic – print, loops, lists), Excel (VLOOKUP, pivot tables)
Data Tools: Google Sheets, MS Excel
Others: Basic internet research, report writing in MS Word
WORK EXPERIENCE
Accounts Assistant | Patil & Associates, Aurangabad | Jul 2023 – Present
 Maintained daily accounts and ledgers using Tally and MS Excel.
 Prepared monthly financial reports for the management team.
 Handled data entry of invoices and purchase orders.
EDUCATION
B.Com (Bachelor of Commerce) – Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University (2023)
TOOLS & TECHNOLOGIES
MS Excel, Tally ERP, Google Sheets, MS Word, Python (beginner)
CERTIFICATIONS
 Data Analytics Fundamentals – NPTEL (30 hrs online course, 2023)
